ecuadorian-encebollado-traditional-fish-.name: Ecuadorian Encebollado (traditional Fish Soup Recipe From Ecuador)
ecuadorian-encebollado-traditional-fish-.original_name: Encebollado ecuatoriano (receta de sopa de pescado tradicional de Ecuador)

ingredients.item: 500 g of fresh fish (preferably bowl, tuna or mere)
2 cebollas rojas medianas, cortadas en juliana
2 pimientos verdes, picados en rodajas finas
2 cucharadas de aceite de achiote (opcional, para dar color)
4 tazas de caldo de pescado o agua

instructions: In a big pot, heat up bilote oil (if you are using it) at medium heat. If you have no achiote oil you can use olive oil or sunflower oil. That's how it heats up the vegetable oil with medium heat. Optional, add a pint of powder turmeric to hot oil. The turmeric will give a yellow tone to the saffrit, similar to the color that the bilote oil contributes. Then add onions and green peppers. Fry till onions are golden and peppers are tender.
Add the minced tomatoes and cook for a few minutes till soft.
Add the fish or water stock to the pot and bring the mixture to boiling. It reduces fire and lets them cook at low heat for about 15 minutes.
Add the fish cut into pieces to the pot and cook till it's tender and well cooked.
Add tomato sauce and mix well. Add salt and pepper to your taste.
Just before serving, it incorporates fresh cilantro and lemon juice. That'll give the plate a touch of freshness. It serves hot and hot and, if you wish, with baked yucca, roasted maize or chifles.

egg-in-a-hole-sandwich-with-bacon-and-ch.name: Egg-in-a-hole Sandwich With Bacon And Cheddar

ingredients.item: -inch-thick slices sourdough or other country-style bread

instructions: Cook bacon in a large skillet over medium heat, turning halfway through, until browned and crisp, 8–10 minutes.
Meanwhile, use cutter to punch out a circle in the center of each piece of bread (save for snacking, now or later).

Transfer bacon to a cutting board; cut in half crosswise. Carefully pour half of bacon drippings into a small bowl. Place 2 slices of bread in skillet and cook over medium-high until bottom sides are golden brown, about 3 minutes.

Crack an egg into each hole in bread (some of the white may pool on top of the bread). Season eggs with salt and pepper and cook until underside is set, about 2 minutes. Using a thin spatula (a fish spatula works best), carefully turn both pieces of bread to briefly cook second side (this helps set the whites, but the yolk should still be runny), about 1 minute. Add 1 Tbsp. butter to skillet and swirl skillet to distribute, encouraging some to get underneath. Carefully turn bread again. Top one slice with half of the cheese. Remove pan from heat and let sit about 1 minute to soften cheese. Top with half of bacon and some hot sauce. Close up sandwich and transfer to a plate. Repeat process with remaining bacon drippings, bread, eggs, butter, bacon, and cheese and more hot sauce to make another sandwich.

eggplant-burgers-recipe-step-by-step-com.name: Eggplant Burgers Recipe Step By Step
eggplant-burgers-recipe-step-by-step-com.original_name: Receta de hamburguesas de berenjena paso a paso
instructions: Let's start our recipe by pressurizing the oven at 200 ° C
Then have your vegetables and wash them very well. Cut the eggplant, onion and pepper into half.
Put the vegetables on an oven plate and spray olive oil.
Baked for about 30 minutes or till your vegetables are soft.
When they're at this point, get them out of the oven and let them get some cold.
Once the vegetables are warm, remove skin from eggplant and pepper.
Coloca la pulpa de la berenjena, el pimiento y la cebolla en un bol mediano. Con un tenedor, tritura muy bien los vegetales hasta que te quede como una masa manejable.
Agrega los dos huevos, sal y pimienta al gusto y el pan rallado.
Fold the garlic and chew the parsley and add them to the bowl.
With a spoon, mix up quite well. You can also do with your hands till you get a really uniform mix.
Warm up a frying pan with some olive oil.
Humedece tus manos e inicia a hacer bolitas con la masa y posteriormente la aplastas hasta darle forma de hamburguesa.
It should be roasted in frying pan with medium heat for about 5 minutes for each side or until they are cooked and compact. You'll realize they're ready when they have a crispy cape.
Now, you only have to enjoy them as you best like them.

eggplant-pasha-lezzet.name: Eggplant Pasha
instructions: 1. Completely peel the shells of eggplants you eat.
2. In order not to decide, wait in salty water for up to 10 minutes.
3. Cut the water from the middle of the eggplants where you are drained, and take it in a pot.
4.  The peppers you eat, the tomatoes you reindeed, and the yellowish olive oil you crushed.
5. Add vegetables from the stove and on eggplants.
6.   Add water to vegetables and taste salt and spices.
7. Cook for 15 minutes on the ground fire.
8. Serve by decorating your thin sparkle with parsley.

elderflower-jam-lezzet.name: Elderflower Jam
instructions: 1. You can prepare colorful tastes for your breakfast tables.
2. Get a deep rough with plenty of water washed and draining water.
3. Pour the apple water on it and close it over.
4.  24 saat bekletin.
5. After a day, filter the water with the help of tulbent.
6. Mix the water with lemon juice and get to the pot.
7. Add powder sugar.
8. Add flowers and boil until it comes to jam consistency.
9. Transfer to hot jars and close the cover.
10. Serve cool.

enjoy-crispy-pasta-chips-step-by-step-co.name: Enjoy Crispy Pasta Chips: Step By Step
enjoy-crispy-pasta-chips-step-by-step-co.original_name: Disfruta de unas chips de pasta crocantes: paso a paso

ingredients.item: 150 gr de pasta corta (penne, rigatoni o farfalle)
1 cda de aceite de oliva virgen extra
1 / 2 cdite of paptika or smoked peppermint
Aceite en spray o en aerosol (si se usa freidora de aire)
A pinch of parrot chili or frosted lemon to give freshness ((optional))

instructions: Cocina la pasta en abundante agua con sal durante 2 o 3 minutos menos del tiempo indicado en el paquete, para que quede firme.
Drain and let the dough cool. Add a tablespoon of olive oil and mix well to avoid pounding.
Put the dough into a bowl and add the spices: garlic powder, paprika, oregano, salt, pepper and parmesan cheese. Mix till everything's well covered.
For air frying: spray oil spray and kitchen at 200 ″ 3 ″ for 10-12 minutes, stirring midtime.
For an oven: preheat at 220 ″ 3 ″, extend the dough onto a plate with vegetable paper and baker 15-18 minutes or until golden.
Let them cool for a few minutes before they get more crispy.

escalloped-apples-and-light.name: Escalloped Apples And Light
instructions: Heat a small skillet over low heat; spray with cooking spray. Add apple, season with salt, and cook until warmed through, 1 to 2 minutes. Sprinkle lemon juice over apples and toss to coat. Stir in raisins, cinnamon, and sweetener. Cook until apples are easily pierced with a fork, adding water if mixture is too dry, 5 to 7 minutes.

exquisite-dominican-sweet-potato-bread-c.name: Exquisite Dominican Sweet Potato Bread

ingredients.item: 1 dta. The essence of liquid vanilla

instructions: Peel the potatoes (raw). It pics and puts into the bowl of the food processor. Fist till you have the texture of dark sugar.
Add eggs, sugar, milk, salt, oil, ginger, cinnamon, vanilla and nail. It processes till you get a soft mass.
Mix the minced coconut with a spatula. If you have no food processor, scrape the potatoes with the less thick side, then mix with the other ingredients.
